text:
Market today: Geopolitical tensions and investor borrowing are the main drivers, impacting risk assets.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL (down 35%), and QQQI is a TRIM (down 1.77%). SPAL is a new, volatile leveraged ETF (down 34%) and needs extra attention with margin.

Watch: Keep an eye on the geopolitical headlines and any follow-through in the tech/chip names.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and overall risk exposure.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming or exiting this leveraged position given its significant drawdown and decay.
SPAL: This leveraged ETF is highly volatile and down 34%. Monitor closely, especially with margin.
No new buys today - hold and watch
